page: Google Cloud Platform a3-highgpu-2g is an accelerator-optimized server configured with two NVIDIA H100 Hopper GPUs providing a total of 159 GB of VRAM. The system is powered by an Intel Xeon 8481C processor with 52 vCPUs, representing 26 physical cores operating at 2.7 GHz, supported by 468.0 GB of system memory. Local storage consists of a 1608 GB NVMe SSD, and the instance does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Benchmark data indicates strong memory bandwidth performance, with read-only small block cached speeds reaching 3399.12 GB/sec and large block uncached write speeds at 94.7 GB/sec. The processor demonstrates strong capabilities in Passmark CPU tests with a score of 62103.94 and Geekbench multi-core compiling tasks at 41189.0. For language model execution, text generation speeds reach 300.85 tokens/sec for a small 135M model and 34.78 tokens/sec for a medium 7B model, though performance drops to an average of 3.96 tokens/sec for a large 70B model.

This server represents a high-density hardware class designed for specialized accelerator workloads. The inclusion of local NVMe SSD storage and dedicated CPU allocation provides reliable resource density, though the configuration lacks complimentary public IPv4 addresses. The hardware profile is optimized for workloads requiring high memory bandwidth and matrix math extensions, such as AMX and AVX-512. Appropriate workloads include machine learning inference, data science jobs, and database operations.
description: Google Cloud Platform a3-highgpu-2g is an accelerator-optimized server featuring two NVIDIA H100 Hopper GPUs with 159 GB of total VRAM, 52 vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon 8481C processor, and 468.0 GB of system memory. It includes 1608 GB of local NVMe SSD storage. Performance benchmarks show strong memory bandwidth, with small-block cached reads at 3399.12 GB/sec, and strong Geekbench multi-core scores of 17415.0. Text generation speeds for large language models range from 300.85 tokens/sec on a 135M model to 3.96 tokens/sec on a 70B model. This server is designed for specialized workloads such as machine learning inference, database operations, and data science tasks requiring hardware acceleration and advanced matrix extensions.

tagline: An accelerator-optimized platform featuring dual hardware accelerators, dedicated Intel Xeon processors, and high-speed local NVMe storage for intensive computing.
bullet_points: Dual NVIDIA H100 Hopper GPUs with 159 GB total VRAM
52 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs with AVX-512 and AMX support
468 GB system memory and 1608 GB local NVMe SSD storage
Strong memory bandwidth and text generation speeds for small to medium LLMs
Designed for machine learning inference, data science, and database operations
